# BizGrants Consulting

> Singapore CCP, Job Redesign Grant, and SkillsFuture grant advisory for SME and corporate employers. Founded 2023. Success-fee model, employers pay only when grants are approved. Office at 60 Paya Lebar Road, #06-28, Paya Lebar Square, Singapore 409051.

## Glossary

- **CCP**, Career Conversion Programme: Workforce Singapore funding that supports employers to hire or reskill mid-career workers (Singapore Citizens and PRs) into new or redesigned roles, with structured on-the-job training (OJT).
- **WSG**, Workforce Singapore: the statutory board administering CCP, Job Redesign Grants, and related employment-support schemes.
- **JRG**, Job Redesign Grant: funding to redesign existing roles for productivity, transformation, or technology adoption.
- **SkillsFuture**, Singapore's national upskilling movement; SkillsFuture-supported funding underpins many CCPs and reskilling initiatives.
- **OJT**, On-the-Job Training: structured, supervised training delivered as part of an employee's day-to-day work, central to every CCP application.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://bizgrants.consulting/): Overview of the firm and headline funding scenarios
- [Services](https://bizgrants.consulting/services/): CCP and Job Redesign Grant advisory services
- [About BizGrants Consulting](https://bizgrants.consulting/about/): Firm profile, advisory principles, and engagement model
- [Case Studies](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/): Five anonymized CCP engagements across travel media, medtech, F&B, built environment, and fund management
- [Pathways](https://bizgrants.consulting/pathways/): All CCP pathways with eligibility, salary minimums, and supported job families
- [Contact](https://bizgrants.consulting/contact/): Free consultation, NAP details

## Case studies

- [Travel media workforce build-out](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/travel-media-workforce-buildout/): Six concurrent role tracks for a content-to-commerce SME transition
- [Medtech Job Redesign + new-hire conversion](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/medtech-job-redesign-reskilling/): GMP and AI/GenAI competency build at a regulated medical device manufacturer
- [F&B parallel conversions](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/fnb-people-operations-conversion/): People & Culture and Operations leadership conversions in the same cohort window
- [Built environment Innovation Lead](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/built-environment-innovation-lead/): Sector-pathway career conversion at an M&E services contractor
- [Fund management finance cohort](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/fund-management-finance-cohort/): Master OJT blueprint for CFO, Fund Accountant, and Investment Professional roles

## Pillar guides

- [WSG Career Conversion Programme](https://bizgrants.consulting/wsg-career-conversion-programme/): Definitive employer guide to the WSG CCP
- [CCP for Employers](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-for-employers/): Step-by-step employer journey from eligibility to claims
- [CCP Grant Funding](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-grant-singapore/): How CCP funding works, caps, supported items, evidence
- [Career Conversion Programmes overview](https://bizgrants.consulting/career-conversion-programmes/): Plain-English orientation for HR and business owners
- [CCP for Digital Marketing roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-digital-marketing/): Role design and OJT examples for digital roles
- [CCP for Sustainability roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-sustainability/): Role design and OJT examples for sustainability/ESG roles

- [CCP vs JGI vs SFEC](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-vs-jgi-sfec/): Comparing CCP, Jobs Growth Incentive, and SFEC for employers
- [CCP Reskilling Examples](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-reskilling-examples/): Real Singapore reskilling use cases

- [CCP Hiring Grants](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-hiring-grants/): GRIT vs MCPP vs CCP, which programme fits SME hiring
